name_en: Mahatma Jyotirao Phule Jan Arogya Yojana (Maharashtra)
name_hi: महात्मा ज्योतिराव फुले जन आरोग्य योजना
ministry: Government of Maharashtra - Public Health Department
benefit_en: Up to Rs 5 lakh per family per year cashless treatment at empanelled hospitals
steps_en: Visit empanelled hospital's Arogya Mitra desk
Show ration card and Aadhaar
Arogya Mitra verifies eligibility
Get cashless treatment approved
Treatment provided free up to the cover limit
scam_note: Treatment is cashless and free. Never pay the Arogya Mitra. Helpline: 155388.

ministry: Government of Maharashtra - Women and Child Development
benefit_en: Rs 1,500 per month direct cash to eligible women aged 21-65
steps_en: Apply via Nari Shakti Doot app or Anganwadi/Setu centre
Submit domicile, Aadhaar and bank details
Application verified by local committee
Rs 1,500 credited monthly via DBT
Renew annually as required
rejection_reasons: Family member is income tax payer
scam_note: Application is free via the official app or Setu centre. Money comes directly to your bank.

name_hi: अण्णासाहेब पाटील आर्थिक विकास कर्ज योजना
benefit_en: Interest-free loan up to Rs 15 lakh for self-employment (interest reimbursed)
steps_en: Register on the Mahaswayam Udyog portal
Submit business project and domicile proof
Get loan eligibility certificate (LOI)
Take loan from bank for your enterprise
Interest reimbursed by corporation on timely repayment
scam_note: Apply only on the official Mahaswayam portal. No agent fee. Interest reimbursement is genuine.

benefit_en: Subsidised full meal (thali) for Rs 10 at Shiv Bhojan centres
documents: None — open to all at Shiv Bhojan centres
steps_en: Locate nearest Shiv Bhojan centre (often near hospitals/bus stands)
Visit during lunch hours
Pay just Rs 10 for a full thali
Meal includes roti, vegetable, rice and dal
No documents or registration needed
scam_note: The thali costs only Rs 10. Never pay more. Report overcharging to the food department.
